rationale: The ensures of the synthetic det fn has shape `(antecedent) ==> det_equal(...)`, so the per-state conjuncts are not free hypotheses — they must be introduced by wrapping the proof in `if (antecedent) { ... }`. Inside, I instantiate both per-domain `forall` ensures at common keys with shared `#![trigger]` annotations (pairing `post1_self_.get_*` and `post2_self_.get_*` so both fire together), chain post1→pre→post2 to derive pointwise equality, and pin every constrained field of the target thread and endpoint.
